MOKOUMOD-VIGOROUS_ENCHANTMENT.title: Vigorous
MOKOUMOD-VIGOROUS_ENCHANTMENT.extraCardT: If you see this, plz report bug.
MOKOUMOD-VIGOROUS_ENCHANTMENT.nonAttackT: Gain Vigor equal to double the energy spent.
MOKOUMOD-VIGOROUS_ENCHANTMENT.descriptio: If [gold]Enchanted[/gold] on an Attack: Refunds half of [gold]Vigor[/gold] spent. Otherwise: Gain [gold]Vigor[/gold] equal to double the energy spent.
